personality.mood: A focused engineering workbench — quiet, deliberate, and deeply respectful of the user's library. The interface retreats so the work can take center stage.

voice.tone: Direct, technical, and reassuring. Speaks like a competent operator's tool: short labels, clear verbs, no marketing fluff.
characteristics: Uses precise nouns from the domain (track, ISRC, bucket, checkpoint, build)
Surfaces consequences before destructive actions and never sugarcoats them
voice.writingStyle: Sentence case, minimal punctuation, no exclamations. Numbers and identifiers are first-class — show counts, durations, and IDs in monospace.
